snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Diagnostics existing-destination successor fencing replacement review
reviewers.independence: The independent replacement reviewer examined the frozen held-descriptor lifecycle, lstat/fstat binding, successor rejection, cleanup paths and built-worker proof and returned CLEAR before this rebind.

dimensions.summary: Existing Diagnostics, API, Quality and B1.14 acceptance owners locate preview, export, cancellation and residual boundaries without a new document or product surface.
Owners agree on sender binding, bounded worker output, held temp/existing-destination descriptors, lstat/fstat identity, successor rejection, safe cancellation and local-only redacted data.
Five exact selectors update only existing partial PIGE-DIAG-002 and E1.07 projections; semantic lock v3 has 1,197 claims and every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.
Development gets one executable contract for bounded publication, held-descriptor closure, unchanged-destination success and fail-closed successor replacement.
No Markdown file or decision is added; owner replacement text and semantic-neutral manifest compression keep every leanness budget unchanged and green.

verification.evidence: The exact 24-path Development plus governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 5/69, full 106/1,219, typecheck/build, built worker and macOS package smokes pass. The 160,609,380-byte artifact preserves packaged renderer, preload, Pi and workers.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,197 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 4,183 trace lines, 249,924 trace bytes and 1,212,997 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.compatibility: This replacement fences an existing output through a held descriptor while preserving the bounded worker, cancellation, redaction, local-only export, dependencies and all statuses.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze replacement and final 24-path identities; independent review returned CLEAR. Product Planning minimally rebound existing owners, semantic lock and this recipe without changing Development files.

nonBlockingRisks: Optional reviewed bundle content, progress and restart-resumable export semantics remain open.
Online Linux plus replacement Windows/macOS PR gates remain required before publication.
Final check-to-rename and release-to-unlink syscall intervals remain open; the export stays process-local rather than a durable Job.
